calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: Diane Kruze; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D525)

Appearances:
Plaintiff/Respondent Louise Illes is present

No other appearance is made in this matter

Plaintiff/respondent stipulates to judge pro tem. Judge Pro Tem Kruze passes the matter to allow time for defendant/appellant to appear. At 9:15 AM, no appearance by defendant/appellant, the appeal is dismissed. Order dismissing small claims appeal is signed and filed. No exhibits were lodged in this action.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Judgment Entered
